zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Buckler於大約1549年出生在英國多瑟特時，她的父親Sir Allex Buckler35歲，母親Elizabeth Watkins31歲。她於大約1570年與Nicholas Derby在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿斯可斯維爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年2月11日在英國英格蘭多瑟特伯頓 布拉德斯托可享年58歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特伯頓 布拉德斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Buckler于大约1549年出生在英国多瑟特时，她的父亲Sir Allex Buckler35岁，母亲Elizabeth Watkins31岁。她于大约1570年与Nicholas Derby在英国英格兰多瑟特阿斯可斯維爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1606年2月11日在英国英格兰多瑟特伯頓 布拉德斯托可享年58岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特伯頓 布拉德斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Buckler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of buckles, Middle English bokeler, Old French bouclier (see Buckle ). Perhaps in some instances a nickname for a fencer, from Middle English bokeler-player.

variants.name: Buckle
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name for a maker of buckles or a nickname given to someone who wore a distinctive buckle, from Middle English bokel ‘buckle’.
English: habitational name from either Buckwell in Ashburnham (Sussex) or Buckwell in Kent.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Buckler was born about 1549, in Dorset, England, her father, Sir Allex Buckler, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth Watkins, was 31. She married Nicholas Derby about 1570, in Askerswell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 February 1606, in Burton Bradstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Burton Bradstock, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Buckler est née environ 1549, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Allex Buckler, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Watkins, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Derby environ 1570, à Askerswell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1606, à Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Buckler um 1549 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Allex Buckler 35 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Watkins 31. Sie hat um 1570 in Askerswell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Derby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Buckler è nata il circa 1549 nel Dorset, England, sua padre, Sir Allex Buckler, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Watkins, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Derby circa 1570, nel Askerswell, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1606, nel Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Burton Bradstock, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Bucklerが約1549年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Sir Allex Bucklerは35歳，母Elizabeth Watkinsは31歳であった。約1570年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアスケルスウエルでNicholas Derbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1606年2月11日にイギリスイギリスドールセトブルトン ブラドストックで58歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトブルトン ブラドストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Buckler(이)가 대략 1549년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Allex Buckler(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Watkins(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 아스커스웰에서 Nicholas Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 버턴 브라드스톡에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 버턴 브라드스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Buckler nasceu aproximadamente 1549, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Allex Buckler, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Watkins, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Derby aproximadamente 1570, em Askerswell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1606, em Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Buckler родилась около 1549 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Allex Buckler было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Watkins, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Derby около 1570 г. в местности аскирсвелл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 февраля 1606 г. в местности буртон брадстокк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности буртон брадстокк, дорсет, Англия.

Se casó con Nicholas Derby aproximadamente 1570, en Askerswell, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1606, en Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Inglaterra.
